name: HiCI: Hierarchical Construction-Integration for Long-Context Attention

description: arXiv:2603.20843v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Long-context language modeling is commonly framed as a scalability challenge of token-level attention, yet local-to-global information structuring remains largely implicit in existing approaches. Drawing on cognitive theories of discourse comprehension, we propose HiCI (Hierarchical Construction--Integration), a hierarchical attention mo...
author: Xiangyu Zeng, Qi Xu, Yunke Wang, Chang Xu
